name: roadmap-planner
description: Evaluations for roadmap-planner skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user asks to create or plan a product roadmap

prompts.reason: Exact trigger word listed in skill description

prompts.input: Help me create a product roadmap for next year
prompts.reason: Exact trigger phrase 'product roadmap' in creation context

prompts.input: I need a release plan for our Q3 features
Help me define our product strategy for the next two quarters
Create a quarterly plan showing our feature pipeline and milestones
prompts.reason: Exact trigger phrase 'quarterly plan' for feature planning

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for project tracking or sprint planning requests

prompts.input: What tasks are in the current sprint?
prompts.reason: Sprint tracking question, not product roadmap planning

prompts.input: Create a Gantt chart for this project timeline
prompts.reason: Project management timeline, not product roadmap strategy

prompts.input: Write user stories for the authentication epic
prompts.reason: User story creation is a different skill, not roadmap planning
